Master-CM1486131.procurementContact: Dr. Steven Wingfield — CEO, Wave Dental Professionals
Master-CM1486131.competitor: Dentsply / 3M (via Dental Whale Savings Network — now Synergy GPO)
Master-CM1486131.notes: NOW CALLED: Wave Dental Professionals (rebranded Jan 2024). Corp address: 27283 W Warren St, Dearborn Hts MI 48127. Website: wavedp.com. CEO: Dr. Steven Wingfield. NOTE: Brian Kimble (original contact) has since moved to Dental Care Alliance — no longer at Wave. Corp phone (404) 254-0053 is office line. Standard/Private pricing — full credit, no chargeback. Best pure wholesale opportunity in territory. 47 offices at $177/office vs $747 benchmark — $107K annual gap. NEXT MOVE: Call (404) 254-0053 and ask for Dr. Wingfield or whoever handles supply vendor relationships. Opening line: 'I'm Ken Scott with Kerr Dental — we have 47 of your Northeast offices on our records and I'd love 15 minutes to discuss how we can help drive more value across the network.' Do NOT lead with product pricing — lead with the data story.

Master-CM106952.competitor: Unknown — national Diamond contract, likely multi-vendor
Master-CM106952.notes: HQ: Chicago IL (ADMI — Aspen Dental Management Inc). 1,000+ locations nationwide, ~53 in your territory. CEO: Bob Fontana (founder). PRIMARY CONTACT: Lori D'Anna, President Field Operations — ldanna@aspendental.com, HQ (844) 296-0187. Based Batavia NY / Syracuse area — geographically close to NE territory. 25-year Aspen veteran, started as patient services rep — knows the field ops side deeply. National Diamond contract — $75K post-chargeback PY, CY Q1 at $21K trending up vs $15K PY Q1. REALITY CHECK: Aspen's national account mgr at Kerr focuses on growth markets (Texas). NE region is being ignored at the national level. STRATEGY: Do NOT try to go around the national contract — you'll lose. Instead, make the case to Lori D'Anna or the NE regional director that Kerr's NE compliance is falling behind and a coordinated push with your Kerr national account team would lift it. Your job is to build the relationship at the regional field ops level and feed data upward. NEXT MOVE: This one needs your Kerr national account manager involved. Build the data case (53 NE offices, $21K Q1 vs benchmark) and bring it to your manager as the reason to get national accounts re-engaged on NE. Lori D'Anna is the right name to drop.

Master-CM098299.procurementContact: Jon Prod — COO Midwest & Northeast Regions
Master-CM098299.competitor: Unknown — formulary-controlled ordering portal may be limiting Kerr visibility
Master-CM098299.notes: HQ: 675 Anton Blvd, Costa Mesa CA. Main office: (714) 668-9005. PRIMARY CONTACT: Jon Prod, COO Northeast — jon.prod@smilebrands.com. Based Minneapolis MN. Former CFO Midwest Dental — owns procurement decisions for Northeast. SECONDARY: Steve Bilt, CEO — sbilt@smilebrands.com (standard format, unverified direct). Bill McCarthy, SVP Real Estate & Strategic Sourcing — also relevant for vendor/formulary conversations. KEY INSIGHT: Smile Brands uses a clinical formulary with an online ordering portal. $258/office may be a formulary visibility problem — offices can't easily find Kerr when ordering. 33 offices CT/MA/RI/NY at Standard pricing — full credit. $64K annual gap. NEXT MOVE: Email Jon Prod directly at jon.prod@smilebrands.com. Subject: 'Kerr Partnership Opportunity — Northeast Region.' Keep it short: your 33 NE offices are spending $258/office vs a $747 regional benchmark. You want 20 minutes to discuss formulary positioning and what Kerr can do to drive compliance. DO NOT cold call the main office — email Jon directly.

Master-CM128801.procurementPhone: HQ Framingham MA — call mydrdental.com main line
Master-CM128801.notes: HQ: Framingham MA. Website: mydrdental.com. PE-backed by Abry Partners. Founded 2004. 43 locations CT/MA/NH/NJ — entirely your territory. Centralized group purchasing confirmed. No exec name publicly available — need to call HQ and ask who manages supply vendor relationships / group purchasing. CY Q1 trending up STRONGLY: $7,334 vs PY $1,156 — something changed. Find out what. This momentum makes it your best near-term private practice segment opportunity. NEXT MOVE: Call mydrdental.com main line and ask for the Director of Operations or whoever handles supply purchasing. This will take 2-3 calls to navigate — be persistent. Once you have a name, the conversation is: 'Your offices are trending up sharply this year — I want to make sure we're supporting that growth and giving you the best possible pricing and service.'

Master-CM1191419.procurementContact: Adam Richichi — CEO, Archway Dental Partners
Master-CM1191419.notes: REBRANDED to Archway Dental Partners Jan 2026. HQ: Danbury CT. Website: archway.dental. CEO: Adam Richichi — (516) 578-8621 mobile, arichichi@dentalassociates.us, LinkedIn active. COO: Joe Eckerle (on website — contact form available). Director of Operations: Kimberly Wells. Director of General Dentistry: Dr. Robert Aledort. 38 locations CT/NY, expanding to MA. 200,000+ patients/year. Platinum tier confirmed. $3,272/office annually — your BEST performing DSO, already above benchmark. Backed by Martis Capital + Din Ventures (PE). NEXT MOVE: This is a PROTECT and GROW play. Adam is active on LinkedIn and speaks at industry events — he's accessible. Send a brief LinkedIn message or email acknowledging the rebrand, congratulate on growth, and ask for a short call to discuss how Kerr can support their expansion into MA. Do NOT approach as if they're underperforming — they're your best account. Lead with partnership.

Master-CM1064374.notes: HQ: Dallas TX. Website: smiledoctorspartners.com. CEO: J. Hedrick. 560+ locations 36 states. ORTHODONTIC ONLY — no general dentistry. Entered CT/MA in 2024 via Dixon Orthodontics. Added 2 more CT practices Nov 2025. 21 locations your territory. Diamond pricing. CRITICAL: Ortho offices don't place composites or resin cements — missing Bond/Cement is expected, not a gap. Real products for this account: CaviWipes (infection control between patients) and TempBond (temporary cementation for ortho appliances). NEXT MOVE: Do NOT pitch SimpliShade or OptiBond here — waste of time. Focus pitch entirely on CaviWipes compliance and TempBond across 21 locations. Best entry point is through your Schein rep at any of their CT offices — get the office manager's name and ask who handles supply ordering. Ortho offices are typically small teams, decisions made locally.

Master-CM1873360.procurementPhone: HQ: 3333 New Hyde Park Rd, Suite 304, New Hyde Park NY 11042
Master-CM1873360.notes: HQ: 3333 New Hyde Park Rd Suite 304, New Hyde Park NY 11042. Website: godental365.com. CEO: Dr. Scott Asnis — sasnis@godental365.com (standard format, unverified direct). COO: Jonathan (last name not public) — came from Henry Schein NY sales & ops. Best contact for vendor conversations. VP Marketing: Lauren Baron — lbaron@godental365.com (confirmed in press release). SVP Operations: Noel Komatz — supported DSO offices NY to MA before joining Dental365. VP Acquisitions: David Rudy — previously Regional Mgr at 42 North Dental (small world). 100+ locations NY/CT/NJ/PA/NH/MA/RI. Diamond tier. Growing aggressively. $1,944/office annually — strong account, above benchmark. NEXT MOVE: Email Dr. Asnis at sasnis@godental365.com or call HQ and ask for Jonathan in operations. The COO's Henry Schein background means he speaks your language — lead with the data, mention you noticed strong growth in their NE locations and want to discuss how Kerr can support continued expansion. This is a growth conversation not a gap conversation.

groupNotes.Master-CM216446:
[AI Call Prep]
1. Your Attleboro Dental Group location opened in September 2022 with over 5,000 square feet—that's a major expansion that positioned you to handle complex cases in-house; how is that new facility supporting your full-arch implant and periodontal work?
2. I noticed you're the Massachusetts Vice President of the Academy of General Dentistry and heavily involved in continuing education on implants and oral surgery—are your team's supply needs keeping pace with the advanced procedures you're now offering under one roof?
3. Your practice is now recognized as the top-rated dental office in Massachusetts on Google; with that kind of patient growth and demand, let's make sure your inventory planning for restoratives and implant materials is optimized.

Also:
· Named top-rated dental office in Massachusetts on Google
· Built multi-location practice model with 25+ clinical staff
· Advanced specialization in dental implants, periodontics, and full-arch restorations
· Aggressive expansion with new 5,000 sq ft state-of-the-art facility in 2022
